body.title: Palace: G-factory-of-factories goal + C-prescient-agents-pa20 concept
body.result: VALIDATED: palace.goals.factory-of-factories, palace.goals.factory-factory, palace.concepts.prescient-agents-pa20 all present in adc.palace
body.description:
UU has been building Prescient Agents 2.0 without naming it. The architectural north star needs to be recorded in the palace so all decisions, tickets, and devices can link to it.

Create:
1. Palace goal node G-factory-of-factories: 'The framework can build anything; Claude stays accessible for design with Akien while cheap workers handle execution; the system continuously improves the quality of its own future decisions'
2. Palace concept node C-prescient-agents-pa20: four-layer architecture (Observe → Relationship Discovery → Future Modeling → Human Decision Support); contrast with Observe→Reason→Act automation; Radar O'Reilly model; key insight: a Prescient Agent is not trying to make decisions — it is trying to continuously improve the quality of future decisions
3. Update all D-*.md stubs in lab/design_docs/decisions/ to carry goal_link: G-factory-of-factories
4. Add concept_links: C-prescient-agents-pa20 to decisions where the four-layer framing applies

**Affected files:** lab/design_docs/decisions/*.md (all open decision stubs), palace DB (adc.palace or memory_palace)
**Design rules:** none apply (documentation + palace writes only)
**Scope boundary:** Palace nodes and decision stub updates only. Out of scope: implementing any PA2.0 layer capability (those are separate tickets).
**Completion criteria:** `psql $IGOR_HOME_DB_URL -tAc "SELECT path FROM adc.palace WHERE path LIKE 'palace.goals.factory%' OR path LIKE 'palace.concepts.prescient%'"` returns both new nodes; all D-*.md files in lab/design_docs/decisions/ have a goal_link line
